subject: Fermi  trigger No 764700395: Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:

A.R.Corella, L.H.Rodriguez (INAOE, Guillermo Haro Astrophysics Observatory) 

MASTER-SAAO robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in South Africa (South African Astronomical Observatory) started inspect of the Fermi GRB250326.70 (trigger No 764700395,20h 23m 40.80s , -38d 57m 36.0s, R=9.31) errorbox  21402 sec after notice time and 21440 sec after trigger time at 2025-03-26 22:43:51 UT, with upper limit up to  18.3 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 79 deg. The sun  altitude  is -60.5 deg. 

The galactic latitude b = -35 deg., longitude l =  3 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=2823964

We obtain a following upper limits.
